response.justification: Szabo brings strong seniority and is currently developing MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq—directly aligned with this role's technical core. However, he has only approximately 13 months of GenAI-focused experience versus the required 8+ years shipping production AI systems, lacks Python (a required language), and shows no evidence of experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or AI evaluation pipelines. His full-stack and data infrastructure background provides a solid foundation, but the gap between required and demonstrated AI systems expertise is substantial.
strengths: Currently developing MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq, directly matching core role responsibilities
Over 20 years of software engineering experience with multiple staff-level positions demonstrating technical leadership
Proven full-stack TypeScript skills and data pipeline experience from handling millions of real-time requests at Dunnhumby
concerns: Only ~13 months of direct GenAI experience; position requires 8+ years shipping production-grade AI solutions
No Python background despite being listed as a primary required language alongside TypeScript
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization, or AI evaluation pipelines
